evidence: "Great western with some real history thrown in."
"Funny old movie. Peters Sellers was great in all the Pink Panther movies."
"Good story. It could have happened if not for all the brave men and women that fought."
"Good story,would have been so much better without all the ugly curse words."
"Has to get better. Moving too slow."
"Perhaps the quality of the film in those days were not made to last long."
"Enjoyed the story, but the picture was poor."
"Great actors and actresses in England. They seem more real that our American tv 'stars'"
"Great actors and great stories. It is nice to watch a program with no foul language."
"I think that these actors did a great job protraying the men and women who fought and died for the freedom of every American."
"If not for the curse words, I think every high school student should watch this in some type of American history class."
"I was born in 1945 and as a young boy I had the privledge of hearing some of these men speak of the hell that they experienced in the Pacific and in Europe."

summary: The user enjoys drama, historical narratives, and comedies, often favoring stories with strong emotional resonance. They prefer slower pacing and are less concerned with production quality, indicating a focus on storytelling and character development.
